scripts.test: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$HOME/.deno/bin/deno}; if [ ! -x "$DENO_BIN" ]; then echo "Deno not found at $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" test --allow-env --no-check --no-lock services/auth-cookies.test.ts services/constraints.test.ts services/desktop-oauth-sessions.test.ts services/enforcement-policies.test.ts services/openrouter-keys.test.ts services/parser.test.ts services/public-apps.test.ts services/permission-cache.test.ts runtime/sandbox.test.ts
scripts.test:full: DENO_BIN=${DENO_BIN:-$HOME/.deno/bin/deno}; if [ ! -x "$DENO_BIN" ]; then echo "Deno not found at $DENO_BIN" >&2; exit 127; fi; "$DENO_BIN" test --allow-env --no-check --no-lock services/*.test.ts runtime/*.test.ts
